title: magnolia manguillo
intro: Magnolia manguillo, also known as Whitebay, is a plant species within the Magnoliaceae family, native to Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Magnolia manguillo include reducing inflammation, fighting off bacterial and fungal infections, and potentially lowering fever. Herbal preparations of Magnolia manguillo can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
